cells.question: Which of these statements comes closer to your view, even if neither is exactly right?
options: Investment from the U.S. is a good thing because it creates jobs in (survey country)
Investment from the U.S. is a bad thing because it gives the U.S. too much influence over domestic affairs in (survey co

cells.question: Do you think that global climate change is affecting the area where you live a great deal, some, not too much or not at all?
I am going to read you a list of possible effects of global climate change. Which one of these effects concerns you most?
options: Long periods of unusually hot weather

cells.question: How concerned are you, if at all, that global climate change will harm you personally at some point in your lifetime? Are you very concerned, somewhat concerned, not too concerned or not at all concerned?
How much, if anything, would you be willing to change about how you live and work to help reduce the effects of global climate change?
Which of the following do you think should matter more in deciding how much a country does to address global climate change?
options: How much a country’s carbon emissions contribute to climate change

cells.question: How confident are you that actions taken by the international community will significantly reduce the effects of global climate change: very confident, somewhat confident, not too confident, or not at all confident?
Would you say (survey country)'s influence in the world in recent years has been getting stronger, getting weaker, or staying about the same?

How would you rate the job the U.S. government is doing dealing with the large number of people seeking asylum at the U.S. border with Mexico: a very good job, a somewhat good job, a somewhat bad job, or a very bad job?

How would you rate the job the Mexican government is doing dealing with the large number of people seeking asylum at the U.S. border with Mexico: a very good job, a somewhat good job, a somewhat bad job, or a very bad job?
Do you strongly approve, somewhat approve, somewhat disapprove or strongly disapprove of the law passed last year that requires all judges in Mexico to be elected by popular vote?
How important is religion in your life: very important, somewhat important, not too important or not at all important?
Outside of attending religious services, do you pray several times a day, once a day, a few times a week, once a week, a few times a month, less often than that, OR never?
Even if you do not feel particularly close to one party, is there any party you feel somewhat closer to than others?
Some people talk about politics in terms of left, center and right. On a left-right scale from 0 to 6, with 0 indicating extreme left and 6 indicating extreme right, where would you place yourself?
Which of the following comes closer to your view?
options: In general, most people can be trusted
In general, most people cannot be trusted

cells.question: About how often do you use the internet, whether on a computer, tablet or cellphone - almost constantly, several times a day, about once a day, several times a week, less often or do you not use the internet?
options: Or do you not use the internet
